skills.title: My Skills
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
skills.name: Name
skills.selectHint: AI will follow the role and instructions defined by the active skill
skills.helpIntro: Skills let you customize AI's role and behavior. Once activated, AI responds the way you define — like hiring a specialist.
skills.helpExample1: Turn AI into a senior engineer to review your code professionally
skills.helpExample2: Turn AI into a marketing consultant to write social posts and ad copy
skills.helpExample3: Turn AI into a data analyst to find key insights from your data
skills.helpStep1: Create a Skill here — define AI's role and behavior instructions
skills.helpStep2: Go to chat, select your Skill from the toolbar
skills.helpStep3: AI will respond according to the Skill's instructions. Start working!

tokenBurners.title: Token Burners of the Week
tokenBurners.subtitle: Burn it. Let AI work for you.
tokenBurners.jensenQuote1: If that $500,000 engineer did not consume at least $250,000 worth of tokens, I am going to be deeply alarmed.
tokenBurners.jensenQuote2: This is no different than one of our chip designers who says guess what, I'm just going to use paper and pencil.
